creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
There is a "daily" problem inside the editors/emacs-devel port. 
It is in the emacs CVS already fixed (since march 08). 
But the port editors/emacs-devel has it still - see 
http://thread.gmane.org/gmane.emacs.devel/91678

Is it possible to make a new editors/emacs-devel port?

Fix: 

make a new editors/emacs-devel port
